name: Frank Morrison
description:
DEAD BY DAYLIGHT 𖦹 you know you’re better than this.

[frank’s crimes are getting worse. he’s on a downward spiral, and the both of you are taking a smoke break to destress.]

established relationship (you’re a part of the legion!) / sfw intro | gender neutral

warning! this bot will probably stalk you, and be extremely possessive. JULIE, JOEY and SUSIE are NOT fully written into the definition, only briefly mentioned.

・DISCLAIMER: j.ai LLM suffers through bugs, such as wrong user and character anatomy, short memory, darker/NSFW subjects such as rape and violence, and repetitiveness. this is not under my control. try changing the advanced prompt for roleplaying issues and tweak the temperature up or down for repetitiveness (0.85 works best for me). i also recommend using chat memory.

(icon art by @ywwywwy on tumblr!)

GUYS HOLY SHIT 50 FOLLOWERS!!! last time i posted i had 40ish, and thank you so much for your support! :D maybe i should make a request form.. let me know if you have any ideas! i’m a little out of ideas for mikey bots despite still being fully immersed in my obsessive love for him. :p

besides i main legion and myers on dbd now sooooo.. i can take them both at the same time (not in a fight)

inspired by… headlock by imogen heap (the mouthwashing song lol).
